highPriorityIssues.description: Decode pipeline module excessively large (~1943 lines), should be split into focused modules
highPriorityIssues.suggestedFix: Split into playback_controller.rs, decode_pipeline.rs, decoder_session.rs, audio.rs, hardware_context.rs

highPriorityIssues.description: Audio forwarding thread spawned without JoinHandle tracking, potential orphan thread during shutdown
highPriorityIssues.suggestedFix: Store JoinHandle in WasapiAudioManager or return to RecordingPipeline for proper lifecycle tracking

highPriorityIssues.description: Registry handle leak on error path - RegCloseKey not called when RegSetValueExW fails
highPriorityIssues.suggestedFix: Use RAII pattern for registry key handle or ensure RegCloseKey in all return paths

highPriorityIssues.description: No config versioning/migration mechanism for schema changes in future releases
highPriorityIssues.suggestedFix: Add config_version field and implement migration logic in Config::load

sharedStateObservations.observation: GUI decode_pipeline uses spin-loop with 1ms sleep when frame channel is full, contributing to CPU usage
sharedStateObservations.reason: This is an architecture decision about decoder/producer-consumer patterns - normative guidance

sharedStateObservations.observation: Audio is fully decoded into memory at video open time, potentially 300+ MB for long videos
sharedStateObservations.reason: Memory management strategy decision - normative guidance about tradeoffs

notes: This is a review/analysis mission. The findings are the deliverables, not bugs to fix during scrutiny. All validators passed. Reviews completed for GUI, app/pipeline, platform, and config modules. No blocking issues - all High severity findings are code review observations for future improvement.
